— Capabilities

Every process,
one partner.

Industrial-grade additive manufacturing across all major technologies — with materials engineering consultation included on every order.

Most popular

Industrial FDM

High-performance engineering thermoplastics for structural prototypes, jigs, fixtures, and end-use parts. Build volume up to 500×500×500mm with dual-material capability and soluble support.

ULTEM 9085Nylon CFABS-M30PC-ISOASA
Request this process

SLA Resin

Photopolymer precision for complex geometries, smooth surfaces, and dental/medical applications with 25μm layer resolution.

ABS-Like WhiteRigid 10KDental SGTough 2000

SLS Nylon

Powder-bed fusion for snap-fit assemblies, interlocking parts, and batch production without support material.

PA12 GFPA11 BioTPU 90AAlumide

Post-Processing

Vapor smoothing, sandblasting, priming, painting, electroplating, and hardware insertion — full finishing in-house.

Quality Assurance

CMM dimensional verification, material certs, and full traceability. ISO 9001:2015 and AS9100D certified operations.

— Material Library

47+ certified
material grades.

Every material is batch-tested and traceable. Our materials engineers recommend the right grade for your mechanical and environmental requirements.

ULTEM 9085
High-Temp Thermoplastic

FAR 25.853 certified flame-retardant resin for aerospace interior components.

71 MPa
tensile
153°C
temp
1.34 g/cm³
density
AerospaceFlame-retardant
PA12-CF
Carbon Fiber Nylon

Chopped carbon fiber reinforced nylon for high-stiffness functional parts.

124 MPa
tensile
185°C
temp
1.08 g/cm³
density
StructuralStiff
Rigid 10K
SLA Resin

Glass-fiber reinforced resin with stiffness comparable to ABS and polycarbonate.

68 MPa
tensile
218°C
temp
1.52 g/cm³
density
High-detailRigid
TPU 95A
Flexible Elastomer

Shore 95A flexible polyurethane for seals, gaskets, and overmold inserts.

34 MPa
tensile
90°C
temp
1.24 g/cm³
density
FlexibleRubber-like
PA11 Biobased
Sustainable Nylon

Castor oil-derived nylon 11 for impact-resistant, bio-certified parts.

58 MPa
tensile
175°C
temp
1.03 g/cm³
density
Bio-sourcedSLS
Copper Composite
Metal-Fill FDM

High copper-content filament for polishable, functional decorative metal parts.

28 MPa
tensile
60°C
temp
3.90 g/cm³
density
Metal-fillPolishable
Need a specific material grade?
We source custom filament blends and resins on request.
Talk to an engineer
— How it works

From file to part
in 36 hours.

Step 01
Upload & Quote

Submit your 3D files (STL, STEP, OBJ). Our automated DFM analysis delivers a detailed quote with material recommendations within 2 hours.

~2hr
Step 02
Engineering Review

A materials engineer reviews your design for printability, structural integrity, and tolerance requirements before production begins.

~4hr
Step 03
Production

Your parts are manufactured on industrial-grade machines with real-time process monitoring and automated layer inspection.

24–36hr
Step 04
QA & Delivery

CMM dimensional verification, surface finish inspection, and material certification. Parts shipped same day or available for pickup.

Same day
Ready to submit your first project?
Upload STEP, STL, or OBJ files — instant wall-thickness and printability analysis included.
Upload Files

— Client Reviews

Trusted by engineers
who ship real products.

4.97
Based on 214 verified orders

“The ULTEM 9085 parts came out perfectly to spec. Our certification team was impressed with both the dimensional accuracy and the material certificates provided. Zero rework required.”

MT
Marcus Theron
Lead Structures Engineer · Axiom Aerospace

“Submitted files at 9pm, had a detailed quote with DFM notes by 11pm, and parts in hand 34 hours later. This is what rapid prototyping should actually look like.”

PO
Priya Okonkwo
Senior Product Designer · Volta Dynamics

“The PA12-CF battery brackets we ordered have been running in a production vehicle for 9 months without a single failure. Tideon is now our default supplier for structural composite parts.”

JR
James Ridgeway
Mechanical Engineer · TerraMotion EV

“Their DFM review caught a wall-thickness issue that would have caused warping in our surgical guides. Saved us two weeks of iteration and a lot of resin costs.”

SN
Sofia Navarro
R&D Director · MedTronix Labs

“The ULTEM 9085 parts came out perfectly to spec. Our certification team was impressed with both the dimensional accuracy and the material certificates provided. Zero rework required.”

MT
Marcus Theron
Lead Structures Engineer · Axiom Aerospace

“Submitted files at 9pm, had a detailed quote with DFM notes by 11pm, and parts in hand 34 hours later. This is what rapid prototyping should actually look like.”

PO
Priya Okonkwo
Senior Product Designer · Volta Dynamics

“The PA12-CF battery brackets we ordered have been running in a production vehicle for 9 months without a single failure. Tideon is now our default supplier for structural composite parts.”

JR
James Ridgeway
Mechanical Engineer · TerraMotion EV

“Their DFM review caught a wall-thickness issue that would have caused warping in our surgical guides. Saved us two weeks of iteration and a lot of resin costs.”

SN
Sofia Navarro
R&D Director · MedTronix Labs

“Best post-processing work we have seen anywhere. The vapor-smoothed SLS drone frames look and feel injection-molded. Our clients cannot believe they are 3D printed.”

CD
Carl Detterman
VP Engineering · Skyrion Systems

“The ISO documentation package was thorough enough to satisfy our FDA pre-submission requirements. We will be using Tideon for every medical device prototype going forward.”

AP
Aisha Pemberton
Regulatory Affairs Lead · NovaMobility

“Ordered 47 unique SLS components for a robot chassis in one batch. Every single part was within tolerance and labeled correctly. Turnaround was 38 hours. Genuinely impressive.”

DL
Derek Lau
Prototype Lead · Helix Robotics

“The Rigid 10K resin finish on our client's consumer product mock-ups was stunning. Smooth, stiff, and paintable straight off the build plate after a light sand.”

RB
Renata Briggs
Industrial Designer · Form & Function Studio

“Best post-processing work we have seen anywhere. The vapor-smoothed SLS drone frames look and feel injection-molded. Our clients cannot believe they are 3D printed.”

CD
Carl Detterman
VP Engineering · Skyrion Systems

“The ISO documentation package was thorough enough to satisfy our FDA pre-submission requirements. We will be using Tideon for every medical device prototype going forward.”

AP
Aisha Pemberton
Regulatory Affairs Lead · NovaMobility

“Ordered 47 unique SLS components for a robot chassis in one batch. Every single part was within tolerance and labeled correctly. Turnaround was 38 hours. Genuinely impressive.”

DL
Derek Lau
Prototype Lead · Helix Robotics

“The Rigid 10K resin finish on our client's consumer product mock-ups was stunning. Smooth, stiff, and paintable straight off the build plate after a light sand.”

RB
Renata Briggs
Industrial Designer · Form & Function Studio
— Pricing

Transparent pricing,
no surprises.

All quotes include DFM analysis, material selection consultation, and shipping estimates.

Prototyping
From $38per part

Fast-turn prototypes for engineers and product teams moving quickly.

  • 36-hour standard turnaround
  • FDM, SLA, and SLS available
  • DFM feedback report included
  • STL/STEP/OBJ file support
  • Up to 5 materials per order
  • Email support
Get a Quote
Production
From $0.08per cm³

Volume manufacturing for end-use parts with full QA documentation.

  • Batch runs from 10 – 10,000 units
  • CMM dimensional verification
  • Material certificates included
  • Priority production queue
  • Dedicated account manager
  • Net-30 invoicing available
Start Production
Enterprise
Customcontact us

On-site capacity, dedicated machines, and NDA-covered IP protection.

  • Reserved machine capacity
  • On-site deployment option
  • ISO 9001 & AS9100D docs
  • Full IP and NDA protection
  • Custom SLA agreements
  • 24/7 engineering support
Contact an expert

All prices in USD. Volume discounts applied automatically. No setup fees.

next project
today.
